topics.title: Halloween and Radio Show Humor
topics.summary: The studio features a series of comedy bits including a heated exchange with a caller, various Halloween-themed recordings, and a discussion regarding the humor and impressions used on the program.

topics.title: The Secret Life of Houdini
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about the history of Harry Houdini, his battle against fraudulent spiritualists, and the publication of a new book detailing his life as a spy and magician.

topics.title: Houdini Biography and Secret Life
topics.summary: The studio discusses the release of a new biography detailing Harry Houdini's career as an entertainer, his involvement in espionage for the British and U.S. governments, and the circumstances surrounding his death.

topics.title: Rolling Stones Concerts and Music Trivia
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Rolling Stones' rescheduled tour dates, the history of Mick Taylor’s tenure in the band, and a humorous interview segment featuring country music stars.

topics.title: Riley Martin Symbols and Sports Predictions
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Riley Martin’s mystical symbols as tickets to leave Earth and a segment on sports betting predictions with Scottie Pharrell.

topics.title: Penthouse Pet Beauty Pageant
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition featuring Melissa Jacobs from Penthouse magazine, who is judged on her appearance, a clarinet performance, and a hot dog singing challenge.

topics.title: Penthouse Pet of the Year Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition featuring various models who perform acts and answer personal questions to be voted as the Penthouse Pet of the Year.

topics.title: Penthouse Pet Beauty Pageant
topics.summary: The studio hosts a beauty pageant featuring models from Penthouse, including Jennifer Emerson and Heather Van Diven, who participate in various segments involving sexual topics, comedy routines, and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: Penthouse Pet of the Year Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition for the title of Penthouse Pet of the Year featuring several contestants, culminating in Heather van der Venn winning the local pageant and performing on a vibrator.

topics.title: Penthouse Pet of the Year Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a competition featuring several models and discusses their experiences, fan interactions, and the logistics of the show's production.

topics.title: Rolling Stones Discography Debate
topics.summary: The studio debates the greatest Rolling Stones songs and discusses various segments including a roast of Gary, guest appearances by Paul Mooney, and upcoming news updates.

topics.title: Studio Dynamics and Dietary Habits
topics.summary: The studio experiences a series of comedic exchanges regarding missing music, the physical antics of coworkers in monkey suits, and a debate over Gary's constant snacking and weight.

topics.title: Crime Stories and Government Policy
topics.summary: The show covers a series of bizarre crime reports, including an incident involving a woman branding a man after a one-night stand, a prison cook's arrest for sexual assault, and a teen's rape of his mother, followed by a discussion on federal abstinence programs and the return of certain comedy clips to YouTube.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including YouTube legal issues, celebrity divorces, public appearances by Whitney Houston and Nicole Richie, and the controversy surrounding a basketball fan's racial remarks.
